scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run docs:check
scripts.docs:check: pnpm run docs:test && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.package:smoke: pnpm run build:debug && pnpm --filter @fontmin-rs/binding artifacts && pnpm --filter fontmin-rs build && pnpm -C wasm/fontmin build && node scripts/package-smoke.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run build:debug && pnpm run build && pnpm -C wasm/fontmin test && pnpm --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter fontmin-rs test && cargo test --workspace && pnpm run test:tools
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter fontmin-rs typecheck && pnpm -C wasm/fontmin typecheck
